params.name: Judgment Knight - Belt
params.description: When research on the dimension of time reaches its peak, one can transcend time and deliver equal judgment upon all beings! Someone has sealed the authority of time within a belt, granting its wearer the ability to toy with others' time. Simply by pressing a button, you can halt the flow of time, just like pausing a game!
